title: Change Pie Chart Widget Colors (not being forced to use label colors)
excerpt: Would like to have the ability to change the colors displayed in pie charts.  Currently, colors are pulled from label color assigned, but would appreciate being able to change the colors to whatever we want and not be he…

posts.author: Kim.Smith (Kimberly Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like to have the ability to change the colors displayed in pie charts. Currently, colors are pulled from label color assigned, but would appreciate being able to change the colors to whatever we want and not be held to the colors used on the labels.

posts.author: Penfold (John)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the pie chart goto the cog to customize.
Click on the segment you want to change the colour on.
On the right will be a “Customize” menu.
In that is “Labels” and Edit color and text"
